mapper.select:
SELECT id, config_name AS configName, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, remark, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_config
deleted = 0
AND (config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR config_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND config_type = #{query.configType}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, config_name AS configName, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
